data.body: DECISION RECORDED (2026-06-09, audit owner direction: clean break from dso): EXECUTE THE DELETE PATH. Delete src/rebar/_engine/jira-credential-helper.sh and tests/scripts/test-jira-credential-helper.sh in one commit; full suite green. Adopt path is context only — do NOT adopt without new owner sign-off recorded here. Release-notes line: 'Removed unreachable dso-era interactive Jira credential helper.'
